statement.informal: `reaction_heat_load` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (delta_h_rxn >= -HRXN_MAX ∧ delta_h_rxn <=  HRXN_MAX ∧ reactor_volume > 0.0 ∧ reactor_volume <= V_MAX ∧ concentration_a >= 0.0 ∧ concentration_a <= C_MAX ∧ pre_exp_factor > 0.0 ∧ activation_energy >= 0.0 ∧ activation_energy <= EA_MAX ∧ temperature >= T_MIN ∧ temperature <= T_MAX), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
